data.description: Granyon is a design studio based in Copenhagen, Denmark and Washington DC. We build authentic brands, and design websites that are unique, powerful, good looking and easy to use. We are specialised in custom builds using Webflow CMS, but are really agnostic. The team is small, fast and senior only. You will find we are in the sweet spot between providing cutting-edge award-winning work, while staying reasonable in costs with quick turnarounds.

Authentic.

Authentic.

Authentic.

In a world of AI perfection – be personal. Embrace the imperfect and the raw. Don't cover up your spots. Leave the hair loose. Ignite real feelings. Create ripples, that spark change. Act weird. Provide thrills and excitement. Stay bold. Be alive. Play! Ask for more than a boring template. Act smarter than the heavy giants. Tell your own story and together: lets create a positive change.
How, you ask? Talk to us. We build brands that matter and digital communication that works.
Granyon is a design studio based in Copenhagen, Denmark. We build authentic brands, and design websites that are unique, powerful, good looking and easy to use. We are specialised in custom builds using Webflow CMS, but are really agnostic. The team is small, fast and senior only. You will find we are in the sweet spot between providing cutting-edge award-winning work, while staying reasonable in costs with quick turnarounds.

Explore our cases below, and get the full overview of our services here. Need some advice regarding your brand or digital efforts? Get in touch here. No obligations! Hang up anytime 😎

Judge

‍

Working with GRANYON was a joint and mould-breaking travel through how we understand the microbial world and meaningfully communicate about it, so all can understand it when engaging with the page. Their patience and persistence in understanding the science and translating this into an interactive, fun, and engaging online experience was very rewarding.
Vanesa Sánchez-Guajardo, PhD. Academic Coordinator / Special Advisor Partnerships and Research Office
DTU Biosustain - MicrobeXplorer
I am so proud of Granyon’s work and the evolution into social impact storytelling! The final result of the campaign is 12 of the 14 men who we featured on the website are now free. It is pretty astounding that we have an 85% success rate. We even used the website to support our efforts to lobby and change the law. Overall, the campaign accomplished exactly what we set out to do: win freedom for people sentenced to life in prison for drugs and change the unfair law that put them there.
MiAngel Cody
The Third Strike Campaign
I'm impressed with Granyon's understanding not only of Rumsans but also of universal design – their dedication and inspirational ideas about communicating universal design in the right way to the target group. Our collaboration is characterized by high professionalism and ambitions, and we continuously challenge each other.
Sidse Grangaard, Senior Researcher, Department of the Built Environment and project manager of Rumsans
Rumsans Brand & Website
"Having worked with multiple agencies, none come close to your genuine interest and kindness. And that shows in the results."
Rasmus Hougaard, founder and CEO of Potential Project
Potential Project Identity & Website
"Granyon emphasized the importance of understanding our company’s mission and purpose in their process. With this approach, they were able to succinctly encompass our vision and effortlessly craft a visually compelling design for our new website. Great collaboration!"
Lilian Chiu, Co-Founder & Head of Design at Legacy
Legacy Website
Awards are nice, as tokens of something achieved (and as bookends for our shelves).

But more than anything we are grateful for all the people we have helped move. From being liberated from injust imprisonment to help fund refugee organisations. To getting kids out of their comfort zone and into the wild. To helping the best stories get told and get listened to. Or to discover the adventure of our heritage hidden several feet below. To helping arquitects make accessibilty in buildings fun rather than tedious. Or help company leaders gain better mental health.

Or to simply sell a nice product, you care about. The list goes on. It's been our pleasure and it makes us proud.  

Helpful.

Helpful.

A Studio of many trades.

We work with branding, visual identity, digital design. We research markets. Understand your position. We ideate, innovate and create new ways for your brand and your website.

We craft logos, identities, colors, shapes, fonts... all the pieces that provide for good looks. We build fast, cool, engaging, performing websites, that make people stop, look, read and click the call to action.
Our disciplines include but are in no way limited to:
1. Discovery & Strategy
Whats the problem and whats our strategy to solve it?
a
User & Stakeholder Interviews
Engage with key stakeholders and users to gather insights directly from those who matter most, understanding their needs, expectations, and pain points. Crucial knowledge, if you want your communication to be worth the effort.
b
Brand Core Story
Craft a compelling narrative that captures the essence of your brand, defining who you are, what you stand for, and how you communicate with your audience. Once this is in place, everything else comes easier.
c
Brand Audit
This is a thorough analysis of your existing brand assets and market position that identifies strengths, weaknesses, and opportunities for growth.
d
Audience Segmentation
To find common ground, we will categorize your target audience into distinct groups based on demographics, behaviors, and needs to tailor your brand’s messaging and strategy effectively. Make it make sense.
e
Market Research
Map out market trends, customer behaviors, and industry dynamics to inform strategic decisions and position your brand for success.
f
Competitive Analysis
We examine your competitors to understand the landscape, identify gaps, and uncover opportunities for differentiation.
g
Naming & Messaging
Your brand name and key messages have to resonate with your target audience and reflect your brand’s core values. A refresh is sometimes essential. We help find the right approach, name and available digital real estates (domain, social media handles etc)
h
Strategic Roadmap
We outline a detailed plan that guides the project from concept to completion, ensuring all efforts are aligned and milestones are met.
i
Goal Setting
We establish clear, measurable goals that align with your business objectives, providing a roadmap for success.
j
Success Metrics
We define the key performance indicators (KPIs) that will be used to measure the effectiveness of the project and ensure it meets your goals. Your investment should not be in vain.
2. Concept & Design
Based on strategy and insigth: this is how we will solve the problem
a
Moodboards & Stylescapes
Moodboards define a brands direction based on inspiration from competition or anything really, while Stylescapes define what direction we chose to go for. it is visual decision making and strategy.
b
Wireframing
We create simple, low to mid-fidelity layouts to map out the structure of your website or application, focusing on user flows and functionality. Know what you say, and what you chose not to.
c
Visual Identity (CVI)
Pending the current strenght of your brand, we design the visual elements that make up your brand, including logo, color scheme, typography, graphic elements and more, creating a cohesive look and feel. Tie it with your authentic story and you will be good to go.
d
User Experience Design (UX)
We focus on creating a seamless and intuitive user experience, ensuring that every interaction with your brand is perceived by your audience as positive and meaningful.
e
User Interface (UI) Design
We craft visually appealing and user-friendly interfaces that make it easy for users to navigate and interact with your digital product. From effective essenta
f
Interaction Design (IxD)
We design the interactive elements of your project, such as buttons, animations, and transitions, to facilitate and enhance frictionless user engagement and satisfaction.
g
Typography & Color Schemes
We carefully research and select typefaces and color palettes that will align with your brand’s identity evoking the desired emotional response from your audience.
h
Content Strategy & Layout
We plan and organize content in a way that is clear, engaging, and aligned with your brand’s voice, ensuring it supports the overall design and user experience.
i
Prototyping Concepts
We often create low fidelity, fast interactive prototypes that allow us to visualize and test design concepts before moving into full development. These help you clarify your goals and facilitates decisionmaking.
j
Design System
We develop a set of design standards, guidelines, and reusable components that ensure consistency and efficiency across all your digital products. Scaleable for any brand size.
k
AI Powered Fast Track
Yes, we do leverage AI whenever it makes sense and is at your benefit. We help you leverage it to gain speed or optimize costs, while keeping your soul and unique positioning.
3. Prototype & Build
Based on the design, this is the system that brings it to life
a
Interactive Prototyping
With the design direction set, we move into Webflow. It is the state of the art tool for building amazing websites allowing us to simultaneously refine the design, the responsiveness, and the interactivity while building page structure and layout in a real-world environment.
b
User Testing & Feedback
As we develop the front-end in Webflow, we are able to conduct ongoing user testing to gather feedback and make iterative improvements. This ensures the design is not only visually appealing but also user-friendly and effective in real-world scenarios, on desktop as well as handheld devices.
c
Front-End Development
In Webflow, we design and develop the front-end simultaneously, ensuring that your website’s look and feel are perfectly aligned with its functionality. This streamlined process allows for real-time adjustments and refinements, resulting in a fully responsive, interactive, and polished website.
d
Back-End Integration
While the front-end is being developed in Webflow, we integrate the back-end with various services, such as CRM platforms, analytics tools, maps, video streaming and more. This ensures that your website is not only visually stunning but also fully functional and connected to the tools you need to manage your business.
e
Performance Optimization
After the front-end is complete, we conduct a thorough optimization process to enhance speed, accessibility, and SEO. We fine-tune every aspect of the website to ensure it performs at its best, providing a seamless experience for your users and maximizing your online presence.
f
Responsive Design
As an ongoing effort, we ensure your digital product looks and functions beautifully across all devices, from desktops to smartphones, providing a consistent or specialised experience for all users depending on what we wish to achieve.
g
Accessibility for all
We build with accessibility in mind, ensuring your website or application is usable by people with any challenge, adhering to industry standards and best practices (either custom or with strict adherence to WCAG 2.1). With Webflow the process is built in: effective and cost efficient.
h
Animations & Microinteractions
Subtle animations and microinteractions often enhances the user experience, so a site feels intuitive and engaging. We carefully build the timelines, so they feel on brand and align with the UX strategy.
i
CMS Design
We work primarily with Webflow. It provides a CMS interface, that is easy to use, learn, but also designed and custom fitted 100% to your website. No noise, no clutter. Just what you need.
j
Video Integration
Video is crucial in the attention economy. We help you leverage modern hosting opportunities so your content will load fast and be displayed seamlessly – and on brand – on your website.
k
Webflow development
As a certified Webflow agency, we have extensive experience designing and developing in Webflow. With this design tool and CMS, you move away from the traditional setup where design is created first and then handed over to an often costly development team. With Webflow, you work directly with the design team, who will craft a unique website tailored to your brand, far removed from templates and generic solutions. If you can imagine it, we can make it happen.
4. Testing, Optimisation & Maintenance
Based on usage, ongoing learnings and new strategy, we optimize and improve to maximise return on the effort
a
Usability Testing
We conduct tests to evaluate how real users interact with your digital product, identifying any usability issues and areas for improvement. We recommend doing this early and ongoing.
b
Quality Assurance (QA)
We rigorously test the product to catch and fix any bugs or issues before launch, ensuring it’s fully functional and reliable.
c
A/B Testing
Optional. Over a defined period we perform controlled experiments comparing different versions of crucial parts of the product to determine which one performs better, allowing for data-driven optimization and improved return on the investment.
d
Analytics & Data Tracking
We implement analytics tools to track user behavior and performance metrics, and use those insights for ongoing improvements. Data is one thing, but it should actually help improve your presence.
e
User Feedback Collection
We (or a partner organisation) gather feedback from users post-launch to understand their experience and identify opportunities for further enhancements. Good design is never done.
f
Continuous Improvement
We embrace an iterative approach, making ongoing refinements to keep your digital product effective, relevant, and aligned with your goals. Let us handle the daily grind, and you take care of your business.
g
AEO / SEO Optimization
It is crucial you tell AI what your story is, before it makes it up, on its own.
h
Post-Launch Support
We provide ongoing support after launch, helping you manage, update, and improve your digital product as your needs evolve. Hear us about a plan that fits your need.

Accessible.

Accessible.

Don't hesitate. We – the humans behind this website – are right here on the other end of this screen, anxiously waiting, hitting the refresh button until you email us.

Use a form, send an email, or call us!

metadata.description: Granyon is a design studio based in Copenhagen, Denmark and Washington DC. We build authentic brands, and design websites that are unique, powerful, good looking and easy to use. We are specialised in custom builds using Webflow CMS, but are really agnostic. The team is small, fast and senior only. You will find we are in the sweet spot between providing cutting-edge award-winning work, while staying reasonable in costs with quick turnarounds.
